combined_text: marching "marching Also found in: Thesaurus, Medical, Legal, Idioms, Encyclopedia, Wikipedia .march 1 (märch)v. marched, march·ing, march·esv. intr.1.a. To walk steadily and rhythmically forward in step with others.b. To begin to move in such a manner: The troops will march at dawn.2.a. To proceed directly a
